data.title: UPDATE: replace clinical preplanning prompt with natural-language phrasing and add boolean normalization
data.description:
## Story
fe2b-52dd

## testing_mode
UPDATE

## What
Replace the clinical preplanning question in Phase 3 Step 2c (#### Preplanning Interactivity Probe, ~line 1221) with natural-language phrasing and add boolean normalization.

## New Prompt (replace lines ~1223-1231)
Replace:
  'Should preplanning run interactively? (true/false, default: true)'
With natural-language phrasing such as:
  'When planning new features, would you like me to check in with you at key decisions, or should I run autonomously?'
  '(Options: "yes" / "go ahead on your own" — default: check in with you)'

## Boolean Normalization
Before writing to config, normalize the operator's answer:
- yes/y/check in/pause → true
- no/n/autonomous/go ahead → false
- Empty/Enter → default true
- Ambiguous → ask yes/no follow-up: 'Just to confirm — would you like me to pause for confirmation (yes) or run without interruption (no)?'

## Preserve
- The explicit overwrite bash block (sed / echo to dso-config.conf) must remain unchanged — it handles the exception-to-merge-not-overwrite correctly
- The mode descriptions (Interactive mode / Non-interactive mode) can be retained in a condensed form

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md — replace clinical prompt text + add normalization instructions in Preplanning Interactivity Probe section

## Acceptance Criteria
- Natural-language phrasing replaces 'true/false, default: true' prompt
- Boolean normalization maps yes/no/ambiguous responses to true/false
- Ambiguous responses trigger a yes/no follow-up
- Explicit overwrite bash block preserved
- test_preplanning_natural_language_prompt passes GREEN
